articles.headline: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
articles.description: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

images.name: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
images.caption: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

articles.headline: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
articles.description: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

images.name: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
images.caption: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

articles.headline: How USMNT, USWNT choose opponents, venues and prices for games
articles.description: USMNT and USWNT fans often complain about high ticket prices, repetitive cities and weak opponents for games, but U.S. Soccer explains everything that goes into such decisions.

images.name: USWNT walks the field at SoFi Stadium April5-2025 [1296x729]
images.credit: Brad Smith/ISI Photos/Getty Images for USSF

images.name: Who should be the starting striker for the USMNT?
images.caption: Herc Gomez and Shaka Hislop discuss the USMNT attacking options as Agyemang, Balogun and Wright all battle to start.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Substitution, French Guiana. Ericsson Thervilus replaces Grégory Lescot because of an injury.
Goal! Nicaragua 0, French Guiana 1. Ludovic Baal (French Guiana) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Jules Haabo.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Jacob Montes replaces Harold Medina.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Byron Bonilla replaces Ariel Araúz.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Josué Quijano replaces Henry Niño.
Juan Luis Peréz (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jules Haabo (French Guiana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Nicaragua 0, French Guiana 1.
Substitution, French Guiana. Thomas Némouthé replaces Ludovic Baal.
Goal! Nicaragua 1, French Guiana 1. Jaime Moreno (Nicaragua) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Josué Quijano with a cross.
Goal! Nicaragua 1, French Guiana 2. Jules Haabo (French Guiana) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Thomas Némouthé with a cross.
Zedan Charlec (French Guiana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Edgar Castillo replaces Matias Moldskred.
Second yellow card to Zedan Charlec (French Guiana) for a bad foul.
Substitution, French Guiana. Ansley Panelle replaces Jules Haabo.
Substitution, French Guiana. Robinho Besini replaces Yvelin Nozile.
Goal! Nicaragua 2, French Guiana 2. Juan Barrera (Nicaragua) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Óscar Acevedo.
Goal! Nicaragua 3, French Guiana 2. Marvin Fletes (Nicaragua) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Byron Bonilla with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, French Guiana. Ullrich Pereira Souza replaces Thomas Vancaeyezeele.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Ronald Palacios replaces Jaime Moreno.
Edgar Castillo (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card.
Marvin Fletes (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Óscar Acevedo (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ericsson Thervilus (French Guiana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
